The account earns a rate of 4.50% AER for balances between £0 and £10,000
The account earns a rate of 4.70% AER for balances between £10,001 and £50,000
The account earns a rate of 4.80% AER for balances above £50,000
Tier 1 is the immediately preceding balance tier to Tier 2
Tier 2 is the immediately preceding balance tier to Tier 3
